home.title: Activate Your USALOCALSIM Service
home.subtitle: Choose Redeem, Buy Plan, or US eSIM. Email and travel date are required, and activation is scheduled for your trip date.
home.intro: Choose your flow below. Email and travel date are required for every request, and your activation is scheduled for your trip date.
home.cardVoucherDesc: Validate voucher and schedule activation. Physical SIM top-up and eSIM vouchers supported.
home.cardPlanDesc: If you already have a partner SIM, select the toggle to waive hardware and shipping at checkout.
home.statusRich: After submission/payment, customers see <sched>Scheduled / Processing</sched>. Status changes to <active>Active</active> only after admin activation.

activate.title: Activate Your USALOCALSIM Service
activate.subtitle: Redeem voucher or buy plan. Enter email and travel date to schedule activation.
activate.option1Desc: Validate your voucher and schedule activation at zero checkout cost.
activate.option2Desc: Choose a plan and pay online. Partner SIM customers can apply hardware deduction.
activate.option3Desc: Use the dedicated US eSIM voucher flow.
activate.optionHint: No ICCID is required in customer checkout.
activate.comboEmailHint: Enter your email and travel date. Activation remains scheduled until admin activation.
activate.esimEmailHint: Enter your email and travel date. You will receive confirmation once active.

flow.subtitleRedeem: Validate your voucher and schedule activation.
flow.subtitleBuy: Choose a plan, set your travel date, and continue to payment.
flow.prepaidNoCharge: Prepaid with your voucher — no checkout charge.
flow.noPaymentFooter: No payment required. Activation will be scheduled for your travel date.
flow.partnerSimCheckbox: I already have a SIM card from a partner.
flow.iccidPlaceholder: 18–22 digits, if you have your SIM number
flow.iccidHint: If you provide it, we attach this SIM to your activation. Leave blank if you do not have the number yet.
flow.notEsimVoucher: This is not an eSIM voucher.
flow.notPhysicalVoucher: This is not a physical SIM voucher.
flow.voucherFieldsRequired: Voucher code, email, and travel date are required.
flow.planFieldsRequired: Plan, email, and travel date are required.
flow.invalidIccid: Invalid ICCID. Use 18–22 digits from your SIM card.
flow.invalidIccidRelaxed: Invalid ICCID. Use 19–20 digits starting with 89; the number must pass the check digit.
flow.loadPlansFailed: Failed to load plans. Please refresh.
flow.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

activateUs.title: US eSIM activation
activateUs.subtitle: Enter your US eSIM voucher code, email, and travel date to schedule activation.
activateUs.esimEmailHint: Enter your email and travel date. You will receive final confirmation when activation becomes active.
activateUs.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Request Received!
success.message: Your request is scheduled. We will activate your service on your selected travel date.
success.messagePaid: Your activation is scheduled and will become active after admin activation.
success.stillProcessing: Your payment is confirmed; we are still linking your activation. Refresh this page in a moment or check your email.
success.bodyActive: Your activation is live and ready to use.

plan.title: Choose your data plan
plan.subtitle: Choose a plan and schedule activation with your travel date.
plan.noUpgradePlans: No higher-tier plans are available for this SIM. Contact support if you need help.
plan.missingEmail: Missing email. Go back and enter your email first.
plan.currentStatusHint: What we have on file for this SIM — not a plan you tap to buy.
plan.confirmExistingTitle: You already have a plan on file
plan.confirmExistingBody: This account already has a scheduled or active plan. Continue with checkout for {plan}?

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Checkout uses the new Buy Plan flow with travel date scheduling.
checkout.missingParams: Missing required parameters. Start from the activation page.
